title: Scones
ingredients: Makes enough for 40 people (can be cut in half)
Proof 4 tbsp. yeast and 1 cup water.  Add 1 tbsp. sugar to water.
instructions: Mix all of the above ingredients.  Let sit ½ hour.  Roll out ½ inch thick and cut out. Drop into hot oil to cook until puffed and golden. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve with butter and jam. OR – can be used as a base for tacos/tostadas.
Recipe from Mary Ann Back – her traditional Halloween night treat!
